stemHtml: Which of the following statements about the West African Tornado (WAT) is correct?

options.a: The WAT is another name for TRSs off the West African coast.
options.b: The WAT is the East-West line of thunderstorms in the ITCZ.
options.c: The WAT is similar to the North American Tornado.
options.d: The WAT is a line squall caused by atmospheric waves.
